name: G1: Checkout as guest (5pts)
desc:
# G1: Checkout as guest

**Epic:** Epic 1: Guest Checkout
**Priority:** P0 (Must Have)
**Points:** 5
**Status:** Ready for Build

---

## Story
As a **shopper**, I want **to checkout as a guest without creating an account**, so that **I can purchase quickly and avoid account friction**.

## Acceptance Criteria

### Must Have (P0)
- [ ] AC1: User can complete checkout without logging in
- [ ] AC2: No registration prompts during checkout
- [ ] AC3: Order is saved to JSON storage
- [ ] AC4: Unique order ID is generated and displayed
- [ ] AC5: Success page shows order ID
- [ ] AC6: Form validates required fields
- [ ] AC7: Empty cart shows message

## Tasks

### Task 1: Order API
- [ ] 1.1: Create POST /api/orders
- [ ] 1.2: Validate cart items
- [ ] 1.3: Generate order ID
- [ ] 1.4: Save to JSON
- [ ] 1.5: Return order ID

### Task 2: Storage
- [ ] 2.1: Create data/orders.json
- [ ] 2.2: Read/write functions

### Task 3: Checkout Integration
- [ ] 3.1: Modify checkout/page.tsx
- [ ] 3.2: Call /api/orders
- [ ] 3.3: Handle success/error

### Task 4: Success Page
- [ ] 4.1: Modify success/page.tsx
- [ ] 4.2: Display order ID

## Technical Notes

### Create:
- app/api/orders/route.ts
- lib/orders.ts
- data/orders.json

### Modify:
- app/checkout/page.tsx
- app/success/page.tsx

### Order ID Format:
ORD-{YYYYMMDD}-{HHMMSS}-{random6}

## Risk Mitigation
- JSON write fails: try/catch + error message
- Duplicate IDs: collision check

## References
- app/checkout/page.tsx
- app/success/page.tsx
- store/cart.ts

---
**ANALYST COMPLETE** - Mary
**Ready for Build (Amelia)**
